visuals.concept: 맨입술 같은데 더 예쁜, 데일리 글로우 누드립으로 완성하는 자연스러운 자기표현
visuals.visual_direction: 청량하고 투명한 분위기 속에서 물광 젤 틴트의 윤기감을 강조. 자연스러운 데일리 무드로 꾸민 듯 안 꾸민 입술의 광택을 부각하며, Z세대의 트렌디한 뉘앙스를 담아낸다.
visuals.generation_prompt: 1girl, korean beauty influencer, 21-year-old cool gen-z korean influencer, messy wet-hair look with long undone hippie curls and micro-braids, trendy Y2K beauty makeup, icy metallic eyeshadow highlight, sharp cat-eye eyeliner, slipping two fingers into the cushion puff strap, looking proud, soft white seamless backdrop with subtle warm undertone, high-fashion cosmetic advertising composition, directional beauty lighting, skin sheen, soft catchlights in the eyes, sharp focus, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, cinematic lighting, photorealistic, hyper-detailed, masterpiece, best quality, 8k wallpaper
visuals.negative_prompt: distorted lips, asymmetric face, extra fingers, deformed hands, text, watermark, low quality, blurry, matte finish, dry lips, cakey texture

visuals.concept: 물광 가득 젤 틴트 한 번이면, 꾸민 듯 안 꾸민 데일리 무드 완성
visuals.visual_direction: 제품의 투명한 젤 텍스처와 윤기감을 극대화하여 표현. 미니 사이즈의 컴팩트함을 강조하면서도 프리미엄한 글로우 틴트의 고급스러움을 담아낸다.
visuals.generation_prompt: product still life photography, no human, no model, an open premium cushion compact, showing the internal mirror and a pristine cushion puff with brand logo, perfectly centered symmetrical composition, eye-level shot, sharp focus on the puff strap, clean white background with soft neutral tone, premium cosmetic advertising composition, commercial product shot, sharp focus, hyper-detailed product texture, soft reflections, photorealistic, masterpiece, best quality, 8k wallpaper
visuals.negative_prompt: text, watermark, low quality, blurry, oversaturated, deformed packaging, matte appearance, dull finish

visuals.concept: 내 입술인 듯 자연스러운 MLBB 컬러로 어디에나 어울리는 데일리 픽
visuals.visual_direction: 차분하고 세련된 캐주얼 무드 속에서 MLBB 컬러의 자연스러운 발색을 표현. 실패 없는 데일리 완성도를 강조하며, 트렌디한 Z세대의 미니멀한 뷰티 철학을 담아낸다.
visuals.generation_prompt: 1girl, korean beauty influencer, 21-year-old cool gen-z korean influencer, messy wet-hair look with long undone hippie curls and micro-braids, trendy Y2K beauty makeup, icy metallic eyeshadow highlight, sharp cat-eye eyeliner, slipping two fingers into the cushion puff strap, looking proud, warm beige neutral background, high-fashion cosmetic advertising composition, directional beauty lighting, skin sheen, soft catchlights in the eyes, sharp focus, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, cinematic lighting, photorealistic, hyper-detailed, masterpiece, best quality, 8k wallpaper
visuals.negative_prompt: distorted lips, asymmetric face, extra fingers, deformed hands, text, watermark, low quality, blurry, oversaturated, unnatural color

visuals.concept: 고민 없이 매일 손이 가는 컬러, MLBB 무드 틴트로 데일리 완성
visuals.visual_direction: MLBB 컬러의 자연스러운 톤을 돋보이게 하면서 젤 틴트의 부드러운 텍스처를 강조. 미니 사이즈의 휴대성과 프리미엄한 제품감을 동시에 표현한다.
visuals.generation_prompt: product still life photography, no human, no model, an open premium cushion compact, showing the internal mirror and a pristine cushion puff with brand logo, perfectly centered symmetrical composition, eye-level shot, sharp focus on the puff strap, warm beige seamless backdrop, premium cosmetic advertising composition, commercial product shot, sharp focus, hyper-detailed product texture, soft reflections, photorealistic, masterpiece, best quality, 8k wallpaper
